title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 30.070 - Vacancy — governor to fill
text:
30.070.  Vacancy — governor to fill. — When a vacancy occurs in the office of state treasurer, the governor shall immediately appoint a state treasurer to fill such vacancy for the residue of the term in which the vacancy occurred, and until his successor is elected or appointed, commissioned and qualified.
(RSMo 1939 § 13016, A.L. 1945 p. 1977 § 6) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11394; 1919 § 13291; 1909 § 11803
